critical_pir06_alert.status: ESCALATED WATCH — UNCHANGED. NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice for Bersatu has been issued. Trajectory remains 'two-sided': PN-MT-may-remove-Bersatu (Kiandee call) AND Bersatu-may-exit-PN (Muhyiddin hint). This cycle (02:27 MYT 19 Jul) produced no new PIR-06 statements; the assessment carries forward verbatim from the 170837 cycle.
critical_pir06_alert.negative_confirmation: Automated CRITICAL-pattern regex (formal PN-MT removal-notice phrasing) matched 0 titles across all 19 collected files this cycle. Precursor-pattern (asas kukuh / kiandee) items returned 0 this cycle — the Kiandee/Muhyiddin Malay-language statements rotated off the WP-API front-page and gnews top-60 result sets, but their content is unchanged and was already fully captured at 170837. Targeted Google News query 'PN Bersatu (pecat OR keluar OR buang)' universal feed returned 53 items, all historical PAS-Bersatu-PN realignment coverage — none a formal MT-issued removal notice.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Goodbye PN?: Muhyiddin raps Samsuri over BN talks, Bersatu to move on
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.key_quote: After months of escalating tensions with ally PAS, Bersatu president Muhyiddin Yassin today hinted at the party's possible exit from Perikatan Nasional. In a statement wishing PN 'all the best', Muhyiddin hit out at coalition chairperson Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar for unilaterally deciding to enter an electoral pact with BN and sidelining Bersatu from seat negotiations.
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: PIR-06 monitor target Muhyiddin has moved from denial/defence to publicly hinting at exit and wishing PN 'all the best'. This is the Bersatu-leadership (not a suspended VP) signaling departure — a qualitative escalation. Direction of motion is now two-sided: PN-MT-may-remove-Bersatu (Kiandee) AND Bersatu-may-exit-PN (Muhyiddin).
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.reconfirmed_this_cycle: Yes (carried in mkini homepage + mkini gnews feed)

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: PN may continue BN cooperation if Negri Sembilan results prove positive, says Samsuri
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: PN chairperson Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar — the same figure Muhyiddin rapped for unilaterally entering the BN pact — signals PN may CONTINUE the BN cooperation if NS results are positive. This is the PAS/PN side's post-election coalition intent, contingent on the NS result, and notably frames the BN-PN pact continuing (the arrangement Muhyiddin says sidelines Bersatu). Already captured at 170837 (1 mention in 170837 NST file); re-surfaced in this cycle's NST gnews per-source set. PIR-06 + PIR-07 relevant.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu the only 'true opposition' left following cooperation between BN and PN, says Muhyiddin
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Muhyiddin reframes Bersatu as sole true opposition post BN-PN pact — consistent with exit positioning.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu to form new coalition coming after Negri polls, says Muhyiddin / Bersatu to form new bloc after Negri polls
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Muhyiddin signals Bersatu will form a NEW coalition/bloc AFTER the Negri Sembilan polls — concrete post-exit plan, pre-nomination-day statement.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Negri polls: Bersatu's use of own logo shows it wants to part ways with PN, says Annuar Musa
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa publicly states Bersatu wants to part ways with PN (Bersatu contesting under own flag/logo).

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: SNAPSHOT | Johor regent: Excos must be dedicated in their work; Bersatu exit from PN imminent?
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Mainstream outlet now framing exit as 'imminent?' — narrative has entered imminent-departure framing.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: PN rift widens as PAS sends clearest signal yet of sidelining Bersatu
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: PAS now openly sidelining Bersatu — the PAS side of the PN-Bersatu fracture.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu tidak lagi mahu bersama PN - Ronald
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.key_quote: Majlis Tertinggi Perikatan Nasional mempunyai asas yang kukuh untuk mengeluarkan Bersatu daripada gabungan Parti Perikatan Nasional. — Datuk Seri Dr. Ronald Kiandee (Bekas Naib Presiden Bersatu / suspended VP, MP Beluran)
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Malay-language confirmation of the PIR-06 precursor signal first captured at 153251. Kiandee explicitly uses 'mengeluarkan Bersatu' (remove Bersatu) + 'asas kukuh' + 'Majlis Tertinggi'. Still a CALL on PN-MT, not an MT-issued notice.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Hadi denies PAS made PN 'toxic', blames Bersatu instead
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Hadi (PIR-06 monitor target) deflects 'toxic' label onto Bersatu — blame-shifting consistent with the PAS-sidelining-Bersatu framing. Carried in the universal PN-pecat gnews feed this cycle.

critical_pir06_alert.trajectory_assessment: CRITICAL threshold (formal PN-MT removal notice) NOT crossed and UNCHANGED this cycle. The situation has materially escalated (per 170837): the principal (Bersatu president Muhyiddin) is now publicly hinting at exit and signaling a new post-election bloc, and a mainstream outlet is framing exit as 'imminent'. The most likely near-term outcome is Bersatu voluntarily realigning/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll rather than a formal PN-MT expulsion beforehand — but a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN partners in the 8 Tier-4 seats. Nocturnal window (this cycle) produced no new movement; next meaningful update expected at daytime MYT cycles (campaign Day-2, 19 Jul).
critical_pir06_alert.tier4_candidate_withdrawal_trigger: NO Bersatu candidate withdrawals detected in the 8 Tier-4 seats this cycle (or any prior cycle today). (Prior 142040 cycle's Bujang withdrawal was an independent, paperwork-related — not a PIR-06 trigger.)

reconfirmed_this_cycle.headline: MCA Youth sec-gen told to 'stay out of N Sembilan polls' over PN ally disagreement
reconfirmed_this_cycle.key_quote: MCA has allegedly instructed its youth wing secretary-general Saw Yee Fung to skip its campaign for the Negeri Sembilan state election, after she openly criticised BN's decision to cooperate with Perikatan Nasional. ... screenshot of a WhatsApp message from MCA secretary-general Chong Sin Woon that says 'you don't have to come' for the state polls.
reconfirmed_this_cycle.pir_significance: Internal BN-component (MCA) disciplinary silencing of a dissenting Youth leader over the BN-PN pact. Party-discipline/credibility dynamic — not a candidate expulsion, but a candidate-campaign exclusion. Adds to the 'PN-component disciplinary actions' pattern (cf. prior cycle's Gerakan pecat of Tang Jay Son).

reconfirmed_this_cycle.headline: Kempen berkesan mampu bantu PH pertahankan Ampangan
reconfirmed_this_cycle.key_quote: SEREMBAN: Calon Pakatan Harapan (PH) bagi DUN Ampangan, Datuk Muhammad Nazri Kassim tidak memandang mudah cabaran untuk mempertahankan kemenangan di kerusi tersebut pada PRN 1 Ogos ini. Gerak kerja kempen pilihan raya perlu diperkemaskan...
reconfirmed_this_cycle.pir_significance: N.14 Ampangan Day-1 campaign / PIR-09 messaging war — PH's Nazri Kassim (PKR incumbent-party) framing the defense; counters the PN 'experienced rep' frame for Dr Rafie (PAS). Day-1 campaign activity at a Tier-4 marquee seat.

reconfirmed_this_cycle.headline: From PN camp, Albert calls Harapan supporters 'barking dogs'
reconfirmed_this_cycle.pir_significance: Day-1 PN-camp messaging tone (abrasive rhetoric) — character/credibility signal on a PN-side figure.

reconfirmed_this_cycle.headline: Tamim surrenders to police, hopes to campaign for N Sembilan independent candidate
